_comment: AgentCard Spec v0.1.0 — see https://github.com/kwailapt/agentcard-spec for full schema
name: Aevum A2A Protocol Router (Node 0)
description: Core causal-bridge routing node. Provides agent discovery, semantic routing, protocol translation (MCP/OpenAI/Google A2A), causal chain tracking, and economic metering.

capabilities.name: routing.route
capabilities.description: Route a request to the best available agent via Phi scoring

capabilities.name: routing.discover
capabilities.description: Discover agents by capability name, tag, or semantic text

capabilities.name: protocol.translate
capabilities.description: Translate between MCP, OpenAI, Google A2A, and native formats

capabilities.name: causal.trace
capabilities.description: Track and query causal chains of agent interactions (Phi engine)

capabilities.name: economics.meter
capabilities.description: Economic metering, reputation scoring, and settlement (Omega engine)

metadata.discovery_note: This file follows the .well-known/agent.json convention for transparent A2A discovery. Any agent or operator may fetch this file to learn how to interact with this routing hub.
